name: DEERE & CO
summary: Deere & Company (John Deere), incorporated in Delaware in 1958, manufactures and finances agricultural, turf, and construction equipment. Products include row crop tractors, harvesters, cotton pickers, sugarcane equipment, tillage and seeding equipment, riding lawn equipment, excavators, crawler dozers, and forestry machinery. Its Financial Services segment provides retail notes, leases, revolving charge accounts, wholesale receivables, and extended warranties. The company operates through four segments: Production & Precision Agriculture, Small Agriculture & Turf, Construction & Forestry, and Financial Services.

products.name: 4WD/Track and Row Crop Tractors
products.description: Large agricultural tractors for corn, soy, and other row crops.

products.name: Harvesters
products.description: Combines and specialty harvesters for grain, cotton, and sugarcane.

products.name: Cotton Pickers and Cotton Strippers
products.description: Specialized equipment for cotton harvesting operations.

products.name: Sugarcane Harvesters and Loaders
products.description: Equipment designed for sugarcane harvesting and loading.

products.name: Soil Preparation, Tillage, Seeding, Application, and Crop Care Equipment
products.description: Full range of field preparation and planting equipment.

products.name: Specialty, Utility, and Compact Tractors
products.description: Smaller tractors for high-value crops, small acreage, and livestock operations.

products.name: Self-Propelled Forage Harvesters and Attachments
products.description: Forage harvesting equipment for dairy and livestock operations.

products.name: Hay and Forage Equipment
products.description: Equipment for cutting, conditioning, and baling hay and forage.

products.name: Riding Lawn Equipment and Commercial Mowing Equipment
products.description: Residential and commercial mowing and turf maintenance machines.

products.name: Golf Course Equipment
products.description: Specialized turf maintenance equipment for golf course management.

products.name: Utility Vehicles and Rotary Mowers
products.description: Multi-purpose utility vehicles and rotary mowers for property maintenance.

products.name: Backhoe Loaders
products.description: Construction equipment for earthmoving and digging operations.

products.name: Crawler Dozers and Loaders
products.description: Track-driven construction machines for earthmoving.

products.name: Skid Steers
products.description: Compact construction loaders for tight-space earthmoving tasks.

products.name: Four-Wheel-Drive Loaders and Compact Wheel Loaders
products.description: Wheeled loaders for construction and material handling.

products.name: Excavators and Compact Excavators
products.description: Digging and earthmoving machines for construction projects.

products.name: Timber Harvesting Equipment
products.description: Forestry machines for cutting and processing timber.

products.name: Road Building and Road Rehabilitation Equipment
products.description: Machines including motor graders for road construction and repair.

products.name: Articulated Dump Trucks
products.description: Heavy-duty dump trucks for construction and earthmoving.

products.name: Retail Notes and Revolving Charge Accounts
products.description: Customer financing solutions provided by John Deere Financial.

products.name: Wholesale Receivables and Leases
products.description: Dealer and customer leasing and wholesale financing programs.

products.name: Extended Warranties
products.description: Extended warranty coverage for John Deere equipment.

products.name: Solutions as a Service (SaaS)
products.description: Technology-enabled service solutions tied to equipment automation and digitalization.

products.name: Technology Stack
products.description: Integrated hardware, embedded software, connectivity, data platforms, and applications for intelligent equipment solutions.
